abuse-form.fields.agree.label: I understand and agree
abuse-form.fields.agree.header: 512(f) acknowledgment, Good faith belief, Authority to act
abuse-form.fields.agree.description: By checking this box, you attest, that you have a good faith belief that use of the material in this report is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; AND that, under penalty of perjury, you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner; AND you understand, under 17 U.S.C. § 512(f), you may be liable for any damages, including costs and attorneys' fees, if you knowingly materially misrepresent reported material. Checking this box also confirms that you have a bona fide belief that the information and allegations contained in this report are accurate and complete, for purposes of the Digital Services Act.
abuse-form.fields.dsa_attestation.label: I understand and agree
abuse-form.fields.dsa_attestation.header: DSA certification of bona fide belief
abuse-form.fields.dsa_attestation.descri: By checking this box, you confirm that you have a bona fide belief that the information and allegations contained in this report are accurate and complete. Please note that, to the extent this report concerns a website using one of Cloudflare's hosting services, Cloudflare may require this box to be checked before engaging in the notice and action process.
abuse-form.fields.ncsei_subject_represen: I attest that: (1) the reported content contains nude and/or sexually explicit images of me; and (2) I did not consent to distribution of this content.

I attest that: (1) the reported content contains nude and/or sexually explicit images of a person that I legally represent; and (2) the person that I represent did not consent to distribution of this content.

Selecting either option also confirms that you have a bona fide belief that the information and allegations contained in this report are accurate and complete, for purposes of the Digital Services Act.

abuse-form.fields.signature.invalid: This must match your full name

abuse-form.fields.signature.description: By entering your name, you affirm all information is true and accurate while agreeing to the policies on this page.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_dmca.label: Copyright Infringement & DMCA Violations
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_dmca.policy: Information to include in copyright complaints

Because Cloudflare shares copyright infringement complaints with the relevant hosting providers and website operators, we only process reports that include all information required by section 512(c) of the DMCA. To ensure that your copyright infringement abuse report is processed, you must include all information listed as required in the form. You may submit up to 250 URLs at a time. For more information about the information to include in your report, go here. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy, and that reports may be released by Cloudflare to third parties such as the Lumen Database.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_trademark.p: To file a report with Cloudflare, please select the appropriate category on the reporting form. Please be sure to fill out each field requested in the form and be as specific as possible regarding the content and its location on the website. You may submit up to 250 URLs at a time. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy, and that reports may be released by Cloudflare to third parties such as the Lumen Database.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_children.po: Cloudflare prioritizes responding to reports of CSAM and will act on them expediently, including by reporting them to the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children ("NCMEC"). We would strongly recommend you contact NCMEC with a report as well. We encourage law enforcement officials to contact NCMEC directly for reports applicable to their jurisdiction. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_ncsei.label: Non-Consensual Sexually Explicit Imagery (NCSEI)
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_ncsei.polic:
Non-Consensual Sexually Explicit Imagery abuse is when images (photographs or videos) depicting nudity or actual or simulations of sexual acts are shared on the Internet without the consent of one or more of the people shown.

To be processed, an NCSEI report must contain information indicating that:

1. The reported content contains nude and/or sexually explicit images of you or a person you legally represent (as a parent, guardian, lawyer, etc.); and

2. You or the person you represent did not consent to the distribution of the reported content.

If the image(s) or video(s) depict a person under the age of 18, please submit an abuse report for Child Sexual Abuse Material ('CSAM') instead.

An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_threat.poli: Reports of violent threats and harassment may include reports of a sensitive nature. Cloudflare has limited ability to address violent threats and harassment: we are not the police and we cannot actively work with the police to report incidents that you report to us. If you are aware of a credible threat of violence, call the police. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy.
abuse-form.report_type.abuse_phishing.po: To file a report with Cloudflare, please select the appropriate category on the reporting form. Please be sure to fill out each field requested in the form and be as specific as possible regarding the content and its location on the website. You may submit up to 250 URLs at a time. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy, and that reports may be released by Cloudflare to third parties such as the Lumen Database.

abuse-form.report_type.abuse_registrar_w:
Use this form to report any issues regarding domains that use Cloudflare's registrar services, including:
  • Inaccurate WHOIS
  • DNS abuse (malware, botnets, phishing, pharming, and spam)
  • Trademark
  • WHOIS disclosure requests
  • Domain hijacking

Please be sure to fill out each field requested in the form and be as specific as possible regarding the content and its location on the website. You may submit up to 250 URLs at a time. An explanation of our approach to abuse and what you can expect us to do in response to your report is available here. Please note that reports submitted through this form are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy, and that reports may be released by Cloudflare to third parties such as the Lumen Database.
abuse-form.mandatory_option_tooltip: This option is required and cannot be changed.
abuse-form.notify.label: Who should be notified?
abuse-form.notify.description_note: Note: The hosting provider may have their own policies for how they notify the website owner of a complaint.
abuse-form.notify.policy: Because Cloudflare does not have the ability to remove content from a website, it is our practice to forward abuse complaints to entities like the hosting provider and/or website owner to follow up. Please specify:
abuse-form.owner.notify: Should we notify the website owner?
